description: An IT auditor is reviewing the process for granting new employees access to systems.

nodes.task_description: Obtain a list of all employees hired in the last quarter and a list of all new user accounts created in the main ERP system.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor has the two datasets needed for comparison.

nodes.task_description: Compare the lists to ensure that every new user account corresponds to a legitimate new hire.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor finds one new user account that does not match any new hire, flagging it as an exception.

nodes.task_description: For a sample of 20 new hires, verify that the access request was approved by their manager before the account was created.

expected_outcome.value: Auditor verifies that all sampled requests had the proper approval.
